Episodes.Title: Deception
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: When the Titans find out Brother Blood has an academy for young super villains, Cyborg goes undercover to find out more about the operation.

Episodes.Title: X
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Someone has stolen the Red X suit and is planning on powering it up. Can Robin stop his own creation?

Episodes.Title: Betrothed
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Starfire heads back to her home planet for her marriage. The Titans follow her.

Episodes.Title: Crash
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: When Cyborg becomes infected by a computer virus, the titans turn to Gizmo for assistance.

Episodes.Title: Haunted
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: The Titans set out to stop Slade, who has mysteriously returned. The main problem: Robin is the only one who can see him.

Episodes.Title: Spellbound
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Raven becomes obsessed with helping to free an ancient magician trapped in a spell book.

Episodes.Title: Revolution
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Mad Mod has taken Robin's youth for his own and has hypnotized the whole country into thinking that the American Revolution never happened.

Episodes.Title: Wavelength
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Aqualad asks the titans for help when Brother Blood creates a new underwater fortress using Cyborg's technology. Cyborg takes it personally.

Episodes.Title: The Beast Within
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Beast Boy takes flack about not being tough enough. Exposure to some chemicals sparks a change in him, but maybe not for the better.

Episodes.Title: Can I Keep Him?
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Beast Boy has been secretly keeping one of Killer Moth's insects as a pet and asks Starfire to help hide him from the others. But Starfire becomes too attached.

Episodes.Title: Bunny Raven or How to Make a Titananimal Disappear
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Raven and the titans are sucked into Mumbo's hat where they play by his rules.

Episodes.Title: Titans East: Part 1
Episodes.Writer: Marv Wolfman, Don Heck, Bob Rozakis
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Aqualad, Bumblebee, Speedy, and Mas y Menos make up Titans East. They ask Cyborg for assistance in taking down Brother Blood.

Episodes.Title: Titans East: Part 2
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Cyborg calls the titans for help when Brother Blood turns Titans East against him.
